hero.bio: I build fast, clean and user-focused web experiences. Passionate about quality interfaces and the details that make the difference.

about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a Frontend Developer with professional experience building websites for marketplaces. I'm passionate about creating fast, clean interfaces focused on the user.
about.p2: My main stack is React and Next.js with JavaScript, though I'm equally comfortable working directly with HTML and CSS when the project calls for it.
about.p3: I hold a Higher Degree in Web Application Development, where I built the foundations I've since applied in real production environments.

contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.title: Get in
contact.info_text: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.

1.title: VextParts
1.description: Multi-tenant marketplace platform for car salvage yards, enabling the sale of spare parts to end customers and garages. Features per-tenant user management, product catalogue, a full order system with checkout flow and payment gateway integration.

2.title: Design System
2.description: A reusable component library with full accessibility support, Storybook documentation and automated visual regression tests.

3.title: Real-time Chat App
3.description: Instant messaging application with WebSocket integration, typing indicators and end-to-end encrypted messages.

4.title: Proyecto Vivir PWA
4.description: Mobile Progressive Web App built for a women's NGO focused on social inclusion. Combines document management and team collaboration to coordinate volunteers and beneficiaries, centralising communication and resource sharing from any mobile device.
